{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030645E77CCBA20D15F77065E6"}"},"total":81},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594816552664138520","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"甜文，我好喜欢，恋爱脑就是男人最好的嫁妆！！一见钟情的小甜饼是谁没有吃到？我吃到了，嘿嘿。大大多写点，爱看，好看[爱慕]然后就是很期待看清朝的啦，比较喜欢清朝的，甄嬛传和如懿传可以多写几篇嘛，爱看[飞吻]还有就是想看一篇男主洁的小甜文。青梅竹马小甜饼，清朝的！！看看我大大！攒了好久的文今天看完了，我开始寂寞了😔","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":22,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594816552664138520%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":84,"s":81,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594816552664138520%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":88,"s":85,"text":"如懿传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594816552664138520%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":122,"s":118,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594816552664138520%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768308647,"group_id":"7385555839869783064","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在小说的世界躲避现实","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0G0EM5bGvRn6RdGklbIgq2GEFhhAFEOtHsrQB6fvKnO","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d1b21c6a40404b41a4ac0e9b69fbe3f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705715&x-signature=SShEIJnurk7dtR2kecD1Rb9BhOg%3D","user_id":"3145068105438936","user_name":"陆陆琪才"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3145068105438936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385555839869783064","book_info":{"abstract":"【独宠+一见钟情+无虐+作精+自私人设不圣母。纯纯的玛丽苏无脑】
【她不需要小心讨好，不需要百般算计，她只做自己，就会得到帝王全部的爱。】
世界1、如懿传【弘历x原创女主】南府小乐妓被一见钟情，恋爱脑皇上无底线宠女主！！！（已完结）
世界2、甄嬛传【雍正x夏冬春】粗暴直接的恋爱脑老装货x飞扬跋扈，毫无素质的没脑子大美人。（独宠+一见钟情）（已完结）
世界3、步步惊心【康熙×原创女主】上位者为爱低头的老婆脑帝王×一心向上爬，受不了一点委屈的美貌小舞女（独宠，一见钟情）（已完结）
世界4、还珠格格【老房子着火乾隆x带娃黑心莲俏寡妇（原创）】（完）
世界5、美人无泪【皇太极×温清 无底线溺爱孩子的爹系男主×很任性没有安全感的漂亮小甜果】（已完结）
世界6、人间烟火×泡沫之夏【欧辰×孟宴臣×超级拜金女主播1V2】（完）
世界7、延禧攻略（原创女主）（完）
世界8、甄嬛传（文鸢）
世界9、如懿传（魏嬿婉）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o14a22853e26dccb08d9519df99eab0d3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小红的红色小花","author_id":"","book_id":"7385555839869783064","book_name":"综影视之绝美炮灰被独宠了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":477,"name":"一见钟情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=477&name=一见钟情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438977400068637208","read_count":"27738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"406150"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"298","tags":"女频衍生,甜宠,独宠,一见钟情,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3c3ed134f5fa07f425ad1fa26b38303e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304005&x-signature=InNnOB8rQr4%2FeCaRjfk%2B1RMYJrU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2796781872350231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030645E77CCBA20D15F77065E6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10640,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1473},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1768460571,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7589343229965288216","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第三个位面绝了，还是得康熙！！！这位分还是得老康，第二个位面都不够看，要么说是你爹，康熙真没让人失望[爱慕]
第四个位面女主很带劲！！豆沙了豆沙了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767041877,"group_id":"7385555839869783064","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"699766298126893"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385555839869783064","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"261"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23855,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7589305660324463384","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[送心]女主控爽了，的确如热评说的不是挂羊头卖狗肉！！！没有任何规矩的爽，不同位面不同人设，（目前感觉是单元文，作者说还不确定女主是否同一个）有无脑不聪明嚣张跋扈，有不讲理横冲直撞嘴毒心毒，有有心机钓系，有黑心肠坏女人，但不管怎样有各种恋爱脑无条件撑腰。
[雀食神作]文中有一句【有脾气就发，想打人就打，想骂人就骂，想欺负谁就欺负，想干什么就干什么，不想就不干。】

[雀食神作]真独宠，不会拖拖拉拉觉得自己是皇帝不应该这样那样冷落一段时间才想清楚，直接一见钟情陷入爱情。位分也不吝啬，比如第二个位面开局就嫔，入宫就妃，第四天就贵妃顺便剥夺了宫权给女主。贵妃的第二天直接让后宫的人来请安，女主直接爆头华妃[笑哭]反正就是很爽，女主所有缺点都是真性情，都是天性，都可爱（咦惹～）

[盯]而且也没其他人什么事，原剧情也没多少，就是看两个人的相处两个人的爱两个人的甜蜜小日子。不过呢，也因为其它原剧情的人都蹦跶不了半章，在这方面缺少了一点爽感。直接一句话就解决了，虽然我也不喜欢摇香菇嘟嘟嘴，但不妨碍我想看作者多虐两集。

[思考]目前看来想看无脑玛丽苏独宠黏黏糊糊的入股不亏，因为90%都是写男女主的腻歪日常，可能半路有点腻，但是很多相处的细节以及他爱女主的行为让你感受到另外一种爽。很适合某一天你想看恋爱脑，你想看无脑小甜文的日子打开～（作者真的真的很爱她笔下的女主）

[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]加油更新！保持质量！没有灵感了可以请假，但是不要弃坑喔～～","text_exts":[{"e":109,"s":106,"text":"坏女人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9D%8F%E5%A5%B3%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589305660324463384%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9D%8F%E5%A5%B3%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":231,"s":227,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120005F77065E6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589305660324463384%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227385555839869783064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767024931,"group_id":"7385555839869783064","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"\\٩(
